SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(tot) FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment, SUM(t.Amount) AS tot
      FROM transactions_1k t
      JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
      GROUP BY t.CustomerID
  ) AS s WHERE s.Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT 
    (SELECT Segment FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment,
                   (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
                    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
                   / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
              AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
              AND substr(Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
            GROUP BY c.Segment
        ) ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1) AS biggest_segment,
    (SELECT Segment FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment,
                   (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
                    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
                   / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(Date,'1','4')='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
              AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
              AND substr(Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
            GROUP BY c.Segment
        ) ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1) AS lowest_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

492:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
    ELSE (total_1997 - total_1996) / total_1996 
  END AS growth_rate
FROM (
  SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN total_amount END) AS total_1996,
    SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1997' THEN total_amount END) AS total_1997
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      strftime('%Y', l.date) AS yr,
      SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
    GROUP BY yr
  ) sub
);	----- bird -----	financial
